CORE Shapeshifting Research Atlas
Version: 0.6.0

Epistemic policy:
Catalog supernatural, occult, metaphysical, cultural, and speculative biological claims with explicit evidence labels. Do not treat metaphysical claims as established biomedical fact.

AI/search connector note:
The ChatGPT Pro console now prefers /api/local-agent with a free local Ollama model when available. OpenAI /api/agent remains optional. Static hosts fall back to local synthesis from archive, profile, uploaded reference metadata, in-app browser context, team recommendations, memory snapshots, collaboration documents, and extraction-job state.

Internal model core:
ChatGPT 5.5 Pro Internal Core - Free local-model first; optional OpenAI-backed route; local profile fallback otherwise
Gateway operation: fetchInternalData(target_id) at /resource/fetch
Uses a free local Ollama model through /api/local-agent when available, then optional OpenAI Responses API through /api/agent, then the local connector-ready profile fallback.

Backend mechanics core:
ErydirCeisiwr Backend Mechanics Core: Internal routing and synthesis scaffold derived from the ErydirCeisiwr attachment request. It controls how prompts, profiles, source records, extraction jobs, and exports are staged inside the static build.
Stages: Intent intake, Profile context merge, Reference lookup, Evidence-tier separation, Mechanics synthesis, Extraction queue expansion, Export and review logging

Free Local Model Agent:
Local endpoint: /api/local-agent
Ollama endpoint: http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/chat
Authentication: No API key; runs on the user's machine
Default model: llama3.2:3b
Install: Install Ollama, run `ollama pull llama3.2:3b`, then start this app with python server.py.

Local Web Scraper:
Local endpoint: /api/scrape
Authentication: No API key; public http/https targets only
Saved request logs: 0
Keyword mode: True
Hidden search base: https://www.google.com/search?q=
Safeguards: Blocks localhost/private/reserved IPs by default, 2 MB fetch cap, No JavaScript execution

Google Programmable Search:
Search engine ID: 56f7592d1993141c3
Script URL: https://cse.google.com/cse.js?cx=56f7592d1993141c3
Public URL: https://cse.google.com/cse?cx=56f7592d1993141c3#gsc.tab=0
Elements: gcse-searchbox, gcse-searchresults

Google Custom Search JSON API:
Local endpoint: /api/search
Authentication: Server-side GOOGLE_CUSTOM_SEARCH_API_KEY
Status: Preferred backend search path when hosted on a server with an API key; otherwise the app falls back to embedded CSE result cards.

Automated AI Research Bot:
Findings logged: 0
Accepted findings: 0
Cadence: opt-in, one attempt per minute, pauses for user review.

File Import Layer:
Imported file logs: 0
Created source records: 0

In-App Browser:
Captured browser targets: 0

Team Chat and Recommendations:
Team posts stored: 0
Open recommendations: 0

Collaboration Documents:
Draft documents stored: 1
- CORE Research Brief (Research Brief; Draft; UserSeth)

Internal Memory Bank:
Browser runtime snapshots are stored locally by the app and exported separately from the live browser.

NVIDIA AIQ Research:
Backend URL: http://localhost:8000
Status: Optional local/self-hosted research backend
Capabilities: Intent-routed shallow research with source citation, Async deep research jobs, Source registry selection across web, papers, enterprise, and knowledge layers

Extraction results:
- No normalized extraction results yet.

Uploaded reference layer:
- Wolf-Shapeshifting Grimoire: Summary of Sources and Concepts (16 pages; Speculative framework; Needs verification)
- The Magic of Shapeshifting - Rosalyn Greene (261 pages; Secondary scholarship; Needs verification)
- ErydirCeisiwr Internal Mechanics Core (47 pages; Speculative framework; Needs verification)
- Learning to Shift (30 pages; Experiential claim; Needs verification)

  Spirits: Unassigned
  Identity: Contributor profile for fox, kitsune, folklore, cultural data, and phantom-shift terminology.

  Spirits: Unassigned
  Identity: Contributor profile for cross-form synthesis, occult mechanics, and source recommendation review.

Extraction jobs:
- No queued extraction jobs in seed.

Source log:

## Ovid, Metamorphoses: classical transformation narratives
Category: Documents
Form: Cross-form
Domain: Folklore
Source type: Book / Manuscript
Evidence: Primary text
Citation: Needs verification
Locator: None yet
Terms: metamorphosis, mythic transformation, divine agency
Notes: Use as a baseline for literary and mythological transformation motifs. Extract animal-change structure, agency, reversibility, and moral framing.

## Clinical lycanthropy and animal-identity delusion literature
Category: Theoretical Concepts
Form: Wolf
Domain: Psychology
Source type: PDF
Evidence: Scientific analogy
Citation: Needs verification
Locator: None yet
Terms: lycanthropy, mental shift, body schema, identity state
Notes: Compare mental shifting claims with clinical descriptions without pathologizing spiritual identity by default.

## Phantom limb and body-schema research lead
Category: Mechanics
Form: Cross-form
Domain: Physiology
Source type: Documentation
Evidence: Scientific analogy
Citation: Needs verification
Locator: None yet
Terms: phantom limbs, phantom body, somatosensory map
Notes: Use as a grounded analogy for phantom tails, wings, ears, muzzle sensations, and non-ordinary body maps.

## Kitsune-tsuki and fox-possession narratives
Category: Cultural Data
Form: Kitsune
Domain: Folklore
Source type: Archive
Evidence: Secondary scholarship
Citation: Compare sources
Locator: None yet
Terms: kitsune-tsuki, kitsune henka, possession, fox spirit
Notes: Track differences between possession, illusion, disguise, and physical transformation. Preserve transliteration variants.

## Alopecanthropy term file: human-fox transformation
Category: Theoretical Concepts
Form: Fox
Domain: Metaphysics
Source type: Documentation
Evidence: Speculative framework
Citation: Citation missing
Locator: None yet
Terms: alopecanthropy, physical shift, animal aura, fox instincts
Notes: Define how the project will use this term. Distinguish invented taxonomy from historical terminology.

## Dragon transformation motif map
Category: Cultural Data
Form: Dragon
Domain: Folklore
Source type: URL
Evidence: Secondary scholarship
Citation: Needs verification
Locator: None yet
Terms: dracanthrope, dragon spirit, wings, scales, breath
Notes: Separate dragon-as-serpent, dragon-as-deity, dragon-as-guardian, and human-dragon transformation cases by culture.

## Werewolf trial and pamphlet corpus lead
Category: Historical Data
Form: Wolf
Domain: History
Source type: Archive
Evidence: Primary text
Citation: Needs verification
Locator: None yet
Terms: lycanthropy, witchcraft, trial records, wolf form
Notes: Log trial texts, pamphlets, confessions, and legal context separately. Flag coercion and demonological framing.

## Occult glamour, astral form, and animal aura practices
Category: Occult Data
Form: Cross-form
Domain: Occult / Esoteric
Source type: Book / Manuscript
Evidence: Experiential claim
Citation: Citation missing
Locator: None yet
Terms: animal aura, astral body, phantom body, glamour
Notes: Catalog claims as practices or testimonies, not verified mechanisms. Track ritual context and source lineage.

## Morphogenesis and regenerative biology analogy file
Category: Mechanics
Form: Cross-form
Domain: Theoretical Biology
Source type: PDF
Evidence: Scientific analogy
Citation: Needs verification
Locator: None yet
Terms: morphogenesis, regeneration, patterning, plasticity
Notes: Use only as analogy for form generation and tissue patterning. Do not imply macro-scale human-animal transformation is biologically demonstrated.

## Energy budget constraint note for physical shifting
Category: Theoretical Concepts
Form: Cross-form
Domain: Theoretical Biology
Source type: Documentation
Evidence: Speculative framework
Citation: Citation missing
Locator: None yet
Terms: energy budget, mass conservation, tissue remodeling, shift potential
Notes: Constraint note for reasoning about how extreme transformation claims would face energy, heat, mass, and tissue continuity barriers.

## Therianthropy community terminology map
Category: Cultural Data
Form: Cross-form
Domain: Metaphysics
Source type: Forum / Community
Evidence: Experiential claim
Citation: Compare sources
Locator: None yet
Terms: therianthropy, m-shift, phantom shift, animal instincts
Notes: Capture vocabulary respectfully. Separate lived identity terms from historical lycanthropy and occult spellwork.

## Keylontic Sciences and holographic blueprint vocabulary
Category: Occult Data
Form: Cross-form
Domain: Metaphysics
Source type: URL
Evidence: Speculative framework
Citation: Citation missing
Locator: None yet
Terms: Keylontic Sciences, holographic blueprint, manifestation template
Notes: Store as a named metaphysical system. Require source lineage, author attribution, and terminology normalization.

## Uploaded PDF: Wolf-Shapeshifting Grimoire source summary
Category: Documents
Form: Wolf
Domain: Occult / Esoteric
Source type: PDF
Evidence: Speculative framework
Citation: Needs verification
Locator: data/reference_ingest.json#ref-upload-wolf-grimoire-summary
Terms: wolf, energy, ritual, occult, spiritual, phantom shift
Notes: Uploaded 16-page source summary used as a background map for wolf-focused shapeshifting concepts and source discovery. Treat as a guide requiring primary-source follow-up.

## Uploaded PDF: The Magic of Shapeshifting - Rosalyn Greene
Category: Occult Data
Form: Cross-form
Domain: Occult / Esoteric
Source type: PDF
Evidence: Secondary scholarship
Citation: Needs verification
Locator: data/reference_ingest.json#ref-upload-greene-magic-shapeshifting
Terms: shapeshifting, physical shift, mental shift, astral, animal spirit, wolf
Notes: Uploaded occult reference retained as metadata and high-level source lead only. Avoid embedding long excerpts; verify bibliographic provenance before quoting or redistributing.

## Uploaded PDF: ErydirCeisiwr backend mechanics core
Category: Mechanics
Form: Cross-form
Domain: Metaphysics
Source type: PDF
Evidence: Speculative framework
Citation: Needs verification
Locator: data/reference_ingest.json#ref-upload-erydir-core
Terms: energy, backend core, routing, synthesis, mechanics
Notes: Used as an internal operational scaffold for prompt intake, profile merging, reference lookup, evidence separation, synthesis, extraction queueing, and export logging. It is not used as visual design.

## Uploaded PDF: Learning to Shift
Category: Documents
Form: Wolf
Domain: Metaphysics
Source type: PDF
Evidence: Experiential claim
Citation: Needs verification
Locator: data/reference_ingest.json#ref-upload-learning-to-shift
Terms: wolf, energy, mental shift, physical shift, phantom shift, fox
Notes: Background reference for practice vocabulary and experiential claims. Keep outputs profile-aware but preserve uncertainty labels for all transformation mechanics.
